sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: See, I have God for my help. The Lord sustains my soul. I will sacrifice to you with willing heart, and praise your name, O Lord, for it is good.

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: He who does justice will live in the presence of the Lord.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Blessed are they who have kept the word with a generous heart and yield a harvest through perseverance.

sections.title: Many and Great
sections.author: Ricky Manalo CSP
sections.snippet: Many and great are bearers of the Word: the Christ speaks; the heart seeks. Gathered as one, we listen to the Word and share the meal of new birth.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Behold, I stand at the door and knock, says the Lord. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door to me, I will enter his house and dine with him, and he with me.

sections.title: Oceans Where Feet May Fail
sections.author: Matt Crocker, Joel Houston, Salomon Ligthelm - HillSong
sections.snippet: You call me out upon the waters; The great unknown where feet may fail; And there I find You in the mystery; In oceans deep, my faith will stand

sections.title: Fly like a Bird
sections.author: Ken Canedo
sections.snippet: Fly like a bird to the Lord, my soul; I want to soar like an eagle; Though I may journey far away from home, I know I'll never be alone.

sections.title: Walk Together Children
sections.author: Traditional African American Spiritual; Adapt. by ValLimar and Frank Jansen
sections.snippet: Walk together, children, don't you get weary; Walk together, children, don't you get weary; Walk together, children, don't you get weary; We will walk for justice in this great land.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
